what are the top 5 highest sales:
SELECT TransactionID, TotalAmount
FROM textiledataset
ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC
LIMIT 5;

group customers_100 by country, count th:
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

result = 'Chart saved to chart.png and chart.html' if (chart := px.bar(customers_100.groupby('Country').size().reset_index(name='Count'), x='Country', y='Count')).write_image('chart.png') & chart.write_html('chart.html') else ''
show employees where name is amit union:
SELECT id, name, salary, department 
FROM employees 
WHERE name = 'Amit' 
UNION 
SELECT 1 AS id, name, salary, department 
FROM employees;
